steps.title: Calculate total books
steps.content: There are n nonfiction books and 12 fiction books, so the total number of books is the sum: $$n + 12$$.

steps.title: Compute probability of nonfiction
steps.content:
Probability equals (number of nonfiction books) divided by (total books). Substitute the values: $$\frac{n}{n+12}$$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
